description: The business units this record is assigned to.

label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_billing_address_city
label: Billing City
description: The city for the billing address.

name: hs_billing_address_country
label: Billing Country
description: The country for the billing address.

name: hs_billing_address_email
label: Billing Email
description: Customer's email from billing information

name: hs_billing_address_firstname
label: Billing First Name
description: Customer's first name from billing information

name: hs_billing_address_lastname
label: Billing Last Name
description: Customer's last name from billing information

name: hs_billing_address_name
label: Billing Address Customer Name
description: Customer's full name from billing information

name: hs_billing_address_phone
label: Billing Phone Number
description: The phone number for the billing address.

name: hs_billing_address_postal_code
label: Billing ZIP/Postal Code
description: The ZIP/postal code for the billing address.

name: hs_billing_address_state
label: Billing State
description: The state for the billing address.

name: hs_billing_address_street
label: Billing Street
description: The street for the billing address.

name: hs_buyer_accepts_marketing
label: Buyer Accepts Marketing
description: Indicates if the customer has opted in/out of receiving marketing emails.

name: hs_cancellation_reason
label: Cancellation Reason
description: The reason given for cancelling the order.

name: hs_closed_date
label: Closed Date
description: Date when the order was closed, null otherwise, set automatically

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Object create date/time
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_customer_phone
label: Customer Phone
description: Phone number of Customer placing the Order

name: hs_exchange_rate
label: Exchange rate
description: This is the exchange rate used to convert the cart amount into your company currency.

name: hs_external_canceled_date
label: Canceled Date
description: Date the order is canceled.

name: hs_external_cart_id
label: Cart ID
description: Unique identifier in an external system for the cart associated with the order.

name: hs_external_checkout_id
label: Checkout ID
description: Unique identifier in an external system for the checkout associated with the order.

name: hs_external_created_date
label: Created Date
description: Date the order is created.

name: hs_external_modified_date
label: Modified Date
description: Most recent order modified date.

name: hs_external_order_id
label: Order ID
description: Unique identifier in an external system for the order.

name: hs_external_order_status
label: Status
description: Current status of the order as recorded on the source system.

name: hs_external_order_url
label: Order URL
description: An URL that links to an external site where the orders details can be viewed.

name: hs_fulfillment_status
label: Fulfillment Status
description: Current fulfillment/shipping status of the order.

name: hs_is_canceled
label: Is Canceled
description: Field indicating if the order is canceled.

name: hs_is_closed
label: Is Order Closed
description: Is order in a closed stage

name: hs_landing_site
label: Landing Site
description: The URL of the first page on the sellers site that the customer landed on prior to them placing the order.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Object last modified date/time
description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_order_business_type
label: Order Business Type
description: The type of Order. By default, categorize your order as either a New Business or Existing Business. Set automatically by HubSpot when an order is closed.

name: hs_order_name
label: Name
description: Unique ID as represented by a number.

name: hs_order_note
label: Notes
description: A block of text associated with the order.

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_payment_processing_method
label: Payment Processing Method
description: Type of payment processing method.

name: hs_payment_status
label: Payment Status
description: Current Payment status of the order.

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_pipeline
label: Pipeline
description: The pipeline that contains this order

name: hs_pipeline_stage
label: Stage
description: The order pipeline stage.

name: hs_processed_date
label: Processed Date
description: The date/time the order was imported into HubSpot.

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_referring_site
label: Referring Site
description: The URL of the site that the customer came from to arrive at the sellers site prior to placing their order.

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_shipping_address_city
label: Shipping City
description: The city for the shipping address.

name: hs_shipping_address_country
label: Shipping Country
description: The country for the shipping address.

name: hs_shipping_address_name
label: Shipping Address Customer Name
description: Customer's full name from shipping information

name: hs_shipping_address_phone
label: Shipping Phone Number
description: The phone number for the shipping address.

name: hs_shipping_address_postal_code
label: Shipping ZIP/Postal Code
description: The ZIP/postal code for the shipping address.

name: hs_shipping_address_state
label: Shipping State
description: The state for the shipping address.

name: hs_shipping_address_street
label: Shipping Street

name: hs_shipping_status_url
label: Shipping Status URL
description: URL to Shipping status for the order.

name: hs_shipping_tracking_number

description: List of Shipment tracking IDs associated with the order.

name: hs_source_id
label: Source ID
description: HubSpot developer App ID from where this order data is first synced.

name: hs_source_store
label: Source Store
description: Data used to identify which store the order came from.

name: hs_tags
label: Tags
description: A collection of tag strings associated with the order.

name: hs_total_weight
label: Total Weight
description: The total weight of the order for shipping purposes.

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Owner
description: The owner of the object.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: Owner's main team
description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_currency_code
label: Currency Code
description: The currency code used in the order.

name: hs_discount_codes
label: Discount Codes
description: Discount Codes on an order.

name: hs_homecurrency_amount
label: Amount in company currency
description: The amount of the order, using the exchange rate, in your company's currency

name: hs_order_discount
label: Discount
description: Total Discount on an order as an amount.

name: hs_refund_amount
label: Refund Amount
description: Refunded amount, if any, associated with an order.

name: hs_shipping_cost
label: Shipping Cost
description: The base cost (i.e. undiscounted), in the orders associated currency, associated with shipping the order.

name: hs_subtotal_price
label: Subtotal Price
description: Total order amount before discounts, tax, duties etc.

name: hs_tax
label: Tax Price
description: Tax amount associated with the order, including duties.

name: hs_total_price
label: Total Price
description: Sum Total amount associated with this order.

name: order_date
label: Order Date
description: Proper date type replacement for order_date_custom

name: payment_date
label: Payment Date
description: Proper date type replacement for payment_date_custom

name: order_margin
label: Order Margin
description: Calculated: hs_total_price minus total_cost

name: order_margin_pct
label: Order Margin %
description: Calculated: order_margin divided by hs_total_price
